notes:
Lecture-class file (not a module file) — §§6/7 Key Concepts and What-You'll-Learn rules N/A (those govern module-file canonical sections, owned by the M2 module file). Strategy alignment is strong on the surfaces a lecture actually owns:

(1) Mood (§1): M2 mood = 'grounded competence — I can feel when a plan is good before approving it.' Lecture closer earns the exact same beat ('After you've done it once, you'll feel when a plan needs the second read and when your own read was enough'). Anticipatory framing per maintainer note — felt evidence lands in the exercise.

(2) Discipline-led (§3): Opens 'Three things a good plan has' (positive discipline) BEFORE 'Three pressures that make bad plans look good' (negative case). The failure-mode framing serves the discipline, not the other way around.

(3) Strategy-fidelity (§4): No front-runs. (a) Pocock's grill-me / 'walk-down-branches' is referenced as the SECOND pass move but NOT named as a Skill — strategy doc line 302 explicitly preserves this ('inlined as a plain prompt so M2 doesn't front-run M3's first-Skill-use moment'). (b) 'plan-mode approval inflation' label is absent — maintainer block explicitly notes the label lands retroactively at exercise P5, per strategy. (c) No Ronacher reference-artifact / verifier vocabulary (M5). (d) No Klaassen attribution (deferred to M5–M6 compounding arc per strategy doc 'Mini-lecture' lines 309–310). (e) Multi-session foreshadow is one line ('Other sessions could be making progress elsewhere. Not today, but soon.') — points forward without teaching.

(4) Themes recur (§5): At least three AE101 themes instance in module-specific language: (i) 90% correct in 'Structure is persuasive / Reasonableness passes for rightness / You already agree with it' — three pressures that make a partial read look like a complete one; (ii) mirror + grain-of-salt in 'Optional: ask plan mode directly' (ask Claude what shifted, verify against artifact); (iii) capture-your-world in 'Named assumptions… A plan without assumptions isn't assumption-free; it's just assumption-silent' — force the system to surface what it's guessing about your domain.

No blocking findings. Verdict PASS.
